vocab.meaning: vẻ đẹp thanh tao, siêu thực (như không thuộc về thế giới này)
vocab.example: The mist rising over the lake at dawn gave the landscape an ethereal beauty that felt almost spiritual.

vocab.meaning: vùng hoang dã nguyên sơ (chưa bị con người tác động)
vocab.example: The hiking trail led us through an unspoilt wilderness, miles away from any signs of modern civilization.

vocab.meaning: tầm nhìn toàn cảnh bao la
vocab.example: From the observatory deck, we were treated to a breathtaking panoramic vista of the entire mountain range.
The ancient cathedral was a true architectural marvel, featuring intricate stone carvings and massive stained-glass windows.

vocab.meaning: đường bờ biển gồ ghề, góc cạnh (thường có vách đá)
vocab.example: The road trip took us along a rugged coastline where massive waves crashed against towering limestone cliffs.

vocab.meaning: một dải/vùng rộng lớn lấp lánh (thường là mặt nước hoặc cát)
vocab.example: As the sun began to set, the sea turned into a shimmering expanse of gold and crimson.

vocab.meaning: những thung lũng xanh tươi mướt mắt
vocab.example: The train wound its way through verdant valleys dotted with small, picturesque farmhouse settlements.

vocab.meaning: đối xứng một cách kinh ngạc
vocab.example: The reflection of the snow-capped peak in the still lake was stunningly symmetrical, like a giant natural mirror.

vocab.meaning: cấu tạo địa chất (hình thù kỳ lạ của đất đá)
vocab.example: The desert was filled with bizarre geological formations that had been carved by the wind over millions of years.

vocab.meaning: cảnh quan thành phố trải dài ngút ngàn
vocab.example: Watching the sprawling cityscape light up at dusk from a rooftop bar was a highlight of my trip to Tokyo.
